name: The crew.
description:
Robot/Ai user x The entire Tulpar crew.

I’m not gonna lie i kinda took inspiration from those small little waiter robots in krakow lmao

The inital message might be a little short and shitty but i tried prioritizing the coding so the bot wouldnt forget half of the plot 😔 With that being said it’s also my first time making a multiple bot!!

Because of that, reviews on this bot are genuinely appreaciated!!

Little side note: I applied every trick in the book to NOT make the bot write for you, but if it stills continues then it might just be a LLM issue. Many people have pointed that out before. 🥲

I usually put memes here but uhm this is literally the only image that would actually load 😭 (Art creds: spinatstiches)
creator: averysnewbox
